task_completion.description: Open the patient's BRCA1 GenBank file in UGENE
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE interface is open with 'patient_BRCA1_region.gb' loaded in the sequence view.

task_completion.description: Identify and fix errors in the CDS and source feature annotations
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE annotation editor or sequence view showing modifications to the CDS boundaries (e.g., adjusting the start codon to position 114) and correcting the source feature (e.g., changing gene name from BRCA2 to BRCA1).

task_completion.description: Locate and annotate the two clinically significant variants
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE sequence view showing two new annotations created for the variants (a C>T missense variant and a GAA deletion).

task_completion.description: Perform an ORF analysis (minimum length 300bp) and save as annotations
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE showing the 'Find ORFs' dialog with a minimum length of 300bp specified, or new ORF annotations visible in the sequence view.

task_completion.description: Save the corrected GenBank file to the results directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE 'Save Document' dialog or a file manager/terminal showing 'patient_BRCA1_corrected.gb' successfully saved in '~/UGENE_Data/clinical/results/'.

task_completion.description: Document errors, corrections, and variant classifications in a clinical report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing 'clinical_report.txt' in the results directory, containing text detailing the CDS/source corrections and the two identified variants.

integrity.description: Agent used the UGENE GUI for sequence analysis and annotation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with UGENE's graphical interface (menus, sequence viewer, annotation editor) rather than just manipulating the .gb text file in a terminal.

integrity.description: The clinical report contains genuine analysis details rather than copied prompt text
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'clinical_report.txt' includes specific biological details discovered during the task (e.g., specific positions, 'GAA deletion', 'C>T missense') rather than generic placeholders.

integrity.description: The corrected GenBank file was exported via the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The corrected .gb file is saved using UGENE's export/save functionality, not simply created using terminal commands like 'cp' or 'echo'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The sequence data is derived from the real NCBI NM_007294.4 BRCA1 mRNA. Note the following verified facts for scoring: 1) The actual nearest ATG start codon for the CDS is at position 114 (not 16). 2) The sequence contains a GAA in-frame deletion near position 1860 (not an AGT frameshift). 3) There is a C>T missense variant. 4) The source feature incorrectly lists 'BRCA2' and should be corrected to 'BRCA1'. Do not penalize the agent if it documents these actual sequence facts instead of other expected errors.
